chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 17 to Java 21.
chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.why_exists: The project targets Java 21, so the compiler must be configured to generate bytecode compatible with Java 21; otherwise, it will compile for Java 17.

chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit release configuration to the maven-compiler-plugin configuration block.
chapter-02/quarkus-in-action/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21 release, reinforcing the property change.
